description:
Offered: every other Fall
This is a course in the fundamentals of playing a musical instrument of the concert band or orchestra (woodwinds, brass, percussion, strings) in a class situation. It is intended for students who have no previous experience and wish to learn how to play an instrument of the orchestra or band prior to enrolling in performance ensembles and /or applied lessons.
Note: Open to all students. May be repeated once for credit.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): FA
